name: An Agentic AI Scientific Community for Automated Neural Operator Discovery
content: We present an agentic approach to autonomous neural operator discovery based on an AI scientific community, which consists of a swarm of virtual laboratories that interact under a citation-based economy of influence. Highly-cited labs found new labs that follow their research direction and replace non-performing labs. Each virtual lab contains three agents: an LLM planner that proposes an architecture, a numerical worker that trains and measures it, and an LLM reviewer that participates in cross
summary: 本文提出了一种基于AI科学社区的自主神经操作发现方法，该方法通过虚拟实验室之间的相互作用来实现。这些实验室共享一个共同词汇，并且在模拟实验中展示了其在解决多种问题上的能力。
key_insights: 提出了一个新的AI科学社区框架用于自主神经操作发现
虚拟实验室之间通过引用经济相互影响，促进新实验室的形成和旧实验室的淘汰
所有9,623次LLM调用都被记录并审计，揭示了虚拟实验室规划者倾向于混合使用架构的趋势
xihe_relevance: 该研究对曦和项目的潜在价值在于提供了一个新的AI科学社区框架用于自主神经操作发现，这可能有助于提高模型的多样性和适应性。
